preamble: The shift from the voiced labiodental fricative [v] to the voiceless velar fricative [x] is a documented form of gradual lenition and retraction, often occurring through intermediate bilabial and glottal stages.

examples.note: Part of a recognized natural sound change sequence (f > ɸ > h > x) observed in various diachronic developments.

sources: Phonological research on gradual fricative shifts.
